title: Hyper's Hexcast Addon
description: A little addon for HexCasting by Petrak@
body:
Just a little addon for [HexCasting by Petrak@](https://modrinth.com/mod/hex-casting). Adds the following patterns:
* Inclining Prfn: Get a list of integers within the [Interval \[0,n)](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Interval_(mathematics)) (equivalent to Python's `range`).
* Rider's Prfn: Get the entity that a given entity is riding (e.g. a minecart).
* Jockey's Prfn: Get a list of entities that are riding an entity.
* Driver's Prfn: Return whether an entity is controlling the entity it's riding.
* Mount spell: Cause an entity to begin riding another entity.
* Dismount spell: Cause an entity to stop riding the entity its riding.
